description_long: This object is a shotgun with a robust, angular design and a metallic finish in shades of tan and brown. It features a long, cylindrical barrel with a prominent muzzle and a ventilated handguard. The receiver is boxy, with a visible magazine extending downward, and the trigger assembly is protected by a rounded guard. The stock is a skeletal, folding type, providing structural support while minimizing weight. The overall construction suggests a modern tactical firearm, with ergonomic grips and a utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, tan and brown shotgun with a long barrel, boxy receiver, and a skeletal folding stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the barrel, magazine, and folding stock.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular muzzle and the narrow profile of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the same major features as view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the skeletal stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
